snippets.title: Interfaces, unions and optional/readonly
snippets.explanation: A literal-union type restricts role; readonly and optional encode the contract precisely.

snippets.title: type for unions/intersections; interface extension
snippets.explanation: interface extends shapes; type composes unions and intersections.

snippets.title: unknown vs any for model output
snippets.explanation: unknown forces you to narrow before use, unlike any which disables checks.

snippets.title: Generics for reuse
snippets.explanation: A generic <T> lets one shape describe many payload types with full type safety.
